metadata.notes: Existing numeric ratings preserved. Added player ratings are generated baseline placeholders; profile fields are complete but some require manual verification.
metadata.accuracyNote: Existing numeric ratings were preserved. Profile fields were corrected where high-confidence public profile/squad information was available. Unverified generated DOB/age values remain null instead of being guessed.

nonBowlerNullFix.displayGoal: Non-bowlers should display as null/dash instead of Does Not Bowl (0).
